The '''''Majestic''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and later by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was refitted with heavy armor plating to enhance its defensive capabilities.<ref name="WizKids">{{WebCite|url=http://www.swpocketmodels.com/images/shipga22.jpg|text=''Star Wars PocketModel TCG - Ground Assault''|archivedate=20160809154853}}</ref>

==History==
The ''Majestic'' saw action during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the Battle of Geonosis, the ''Majestic'' was deployed to [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] to extract [[Omega Squad]] from the planet, and was eventually joined by the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Vengeance (Dreadnaught-class)|''Vengeance'']]. The ''Majestic'' provided gunnery support to Omega and heavily damaged a [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] vessel in orbit of Qiilura before extracting Omega Squad.<ref name="RC:HC">''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]''</ref> 367 days, almost a year, after Geonosis, the ''Majestic'' responded to a [[Red Zero]] signal from Omega Squad. However, Omega was rescued by Delta Squad before Majestic could reach their position, so the ''Majestic'' was diverted to find their TIV pilot, [[Sicko/Legends|Sicko]]. After finding the pilot's body and the accompanying TIV wreckage, ''Majestic's'' CO informed Coruscant HQ.<ref name="RC:TZ">''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''</ref> The ''Majestic'' later served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
